topic: If Clauses / Conditionals Part 1 — Zero & First Conditional

questions.hindi: अगर पानी 100 डिग्री तक गर्म होता है, तो वह उबलता है।
options: If you eat this, you will feel good.
If you don't understand this, ask.
If you heat ice, it melts.
If water heats to 100 degrees, it boils.
questions.answer: If water heats to 100 degrees, it boils.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "अगर पानी 100 डिग्री तक गर्म होता है, तो वह उबलता है।" = "If water heats to 100 degrees, it boils."

options: help
comes
time
ice
questions.answer: ice
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "If you heat ice, it melts."

questions.sentence: If I get time, I will come yesterday.
options: If I get time, I will come yesterday.
If I get time, I will come.
questions.answer: If I get time, I will come.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "If I get time, I will come."

questions.hindi: अगर बारिश हुई, तो हम घर पर रहेंगे।
options: If you go out in summer, you sweat.
If the electricity goes off, the room becomes dark.
If you work hard, you will succeed.
If it rains, we will stay home.
questions.answer: If it rains, we will stay home.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "अगर बारिश हुई, तो हम घर पर रहेंगे।" = "If it rains, we will stay home."

questions.sentence: If you work _____ you will succeed.
options: this
you
early
hard
questions.answer: hard
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "If you work hard, you will succeed."

questions.sentence: If he comes early, we will start yesterday.
options: If he comes early, we will start yesterday.
If he comes early, we will start.
questions.answer: If he comes early, we will start.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "If he comes early, we will start."

questions.hindi: अगर सूरज निकलता है, तो दिन गर्म होता है।
options: If you sleep early, you will wake up early.
If water heats to 100 degrees, it boils.
If you eat this, you will feel good.
If the sun comes out, the day is warm.
questions.answer: If the sun comes out, the day is warm.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "अगर सूरज निकलता है, तो दिन गर्म होता है।" = "If the sun comes out, the day is warm."

questions.sentence: If you eat this, _____ will feel good.
options: understand
ice
help
you
questions.answer: you
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "If you eat this, you will feel good."

questions.sentence: If you need help, tell me yesterday.
options: If you need help, tell me yesterday.
If you need help, tell me.
questions.answer: If you need help, tell me.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "If you need help, tell me."

questions.hindi: अगर वह नहीं आया, तो हम शुरू करेंगे।
options: If you do this, I will be happy.
If it rains, we will stay home.
If you go out in summer, you sweat.
If he doesn't come, we will start.
questions.answer: If he doesn't come, we will start.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "अगर वह नहीं आया, तो हम शुरू करेंगे।" = "If he doesn't come, we will start."

questions.sentence: If you go out _____ summer, you sweat.
options: goes
hard
this
in
questions.answer: in
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "If you go out in summer, you sweat."

questions.sentence: If I pass this exam, I will be happy yesterday.
options: If I pass this exam, I will be happy yesterday.
If I pass this exam, I will be happy.
questions.answer: If I pass this exam, I will be happy.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "If I pass this exam, I will be happy."

questions.hindi: अगर पानी नहीं मिलेगा, तो पौधे मर जाएंगे।
options: If I get a chance, I will go abroad.
If the sun comes out, the day is warm.
If you sleep early, you will wake up early.
If plants don't get water, they die.
questions.answer: If plants don't get water, they die.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "अगर पानी नहीं मिलेगा, तो पौधे मर जाएंगे।" = "If plants don't get water, they die."

questions.sentence: If you sleep early, _____ will wake up early.
options: to
this
understand
you
questions.answer: you
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "If you sleep early, you will wake up early."

questions.sentence: If you don't understand this, ask yesterday.
options: If you don't understand this, ask yesterday.
If you don't understand this, ask.
questions.answer: If you don't understand this, ask.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "If you don't understand this, ask."

questions.hindi: अगर धूप निकलती है, तो बर्फ पिघलती है।
options: If I get time, I will come.
If he doesn't come, we will start.
If you do this, I will be happy.
If the sun comes out, snow melts.
questions.answer: If the sun comes out, snow melts.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "अगर धूप निकलती है, तो बर्फ पिघलती है।" = "If the sun comes out, snow melts."

questions.sentence: If you do this, _____ will be happy.
options: we
out
goes
I
questions.answer: I
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "If you do this, I will be happy."

questions.sentence: If the electricity goes off, the room becomes dark yesterday.
options: If the electricity goes off, the room becomes dark yesterday.
If the electricity goes off, the room becomes dark.
questions.answer: If the electricity goes off, the room becomes dark.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "If the electricity goes off, the room becomes dark."

questions.hindi: अगर तुम practice करोगे, तो बेहतर बनोगे।
options: If he comes early, we will start.
If plants don't get water, they die.
If I get a chance, I will go abroad.
If you practice, you will get better.
questions.answer: If you practice, you will get better.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "अगर तुम practice करोगे, तो बेहतर बनोगे।" = "If you practice, you will get better."

questions.sentence: If I get a _____ I will go abroad.
options: comes
early
to
chance
questions.answer: chance
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "If I get a chance, I will go abroad."
